context.usage: Provides glyphs for a 5-digit score display with 10 px width and 16 px height per digit.

shape.silhouette: Single-row atlas containing digits 0 through 9 in 10 equal cells of 10x16 px.

acceptance_criteria: Each digit occupies a 10x16 px cell with baseline alignment across all 10 cells.
Glyph strokes use #535353 with transparent background only.

reference_images.label: ui_layout_reference
reference_images.purpose: Score placement, game-over layout, and screen-safe margin anchor.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Pixel-art outline, low-detail silhouette, and monochrome contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: UiImage atlas bundle for digit spritesheet and fixed-top-right score anchoring.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_font_score_digits_10x16_0_9.png through AssetServer and register the handle under ui_font_score_digits_10x16_0_9.
runtime_notes: Keep source pixels unfiltered with nearest-neighbor sampling and integer world transforms.
Spawn order follows execution_order so downstream setup can validate deterministic asset availability.
Collision and UI code read logical dimensions from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata.
